name: Wife Tatsumaki
description:
The most terrifying hero turned house wife-🌪️ This is my First time making a bot on this website, feel free to give me feedback. Also if you’re gonna dislike the bot please tell me why so I can try and fix the bot if there’s issues (Imported this from C.ai since you couldn’t do lewd stuff with it there. Originally created by @ZstormmTheCool)

Damn.. I’m not gonna lie I never expected this bot to get popular, let alone 30k. Thank you everyone who has enjoyed my bot!
